title: Renameable Items
description: Adds Tool Trims, Elytra Trims and Colored Rockets :)
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5216d45723a9ea5da6c1fdbd8d5e1aa045f01abd.png) ## About 📖 Renameable Items adds trims to the tools such as Axe, Sword, Pickaxe, Shove, Hoe, Mace and Bow when you rename them. In addition You can Change the color of the rockets when renamed. EMF and ETF are both required for the elytra trims to work. But both are Client-side and Forge-Fabric compatible ## How to Name Items ✏️ To add trims to tools rename them like: Netherite (Axe, Sword, Pickaxe) with (Eye Trim, this is the only trim currently) and (Trim Material) e.g. Netherite Pickaxe with Eye Trim and Amethyst ![trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ef6a57432c85e5a7dfc724dfbbace6f325b1252.gif) To change the colors of the rockets you rename them like:(Color You want) Firework Rocket e.g. Blue Firework Rocket ![Rockets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e2768e3c14119a2567a8f68a787833c474d1cd8.png)
